name: Time Series Aggregation
description: Generic time series analysis pattern for any CSV/Parquet data with a date column. Aggregates numeric values by day, week, or month to identify trends, seasonality, and anomalies. Works with sales data, event logs, metrics, or any time-stamped data.
sql_template:
WITH time_buckets AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('{{time_bucket}}', {{date_column}}::DATE) AS period,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count,
    SUM({{value_column}}) AS total_value,
    AVG({{value_column}}) AS avg_value,
    MIN({{value_column}}) AS min_value,
    MAX({{value_column}}) AS max_value,
    STDDEV({{value_column}}) AS stddev_value
  FROM {{table_name}}
  WHERE {{date_column}}::DATE >= '{{start_date}}'
    AND {{date_column}}::DATE < '{{end_date}}'
  GROUP BY period
)
SELECT 
  period,
  row_count,
  ROUND(total_value, 2) AS total_value,
  ROUND(avg_value, 2) AS avg_value,
  ROUND(min_value, 2) AS min_value,
  ROUND(max_value, 2) AS max_value,
  ROUND(stddev_value, 2) AS stddev_value,
  ROUND(total_value - LAG(total_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 2) AS change_from_prev,
  ROUND(100.0 * (total_value - LAG(total_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) / NULLIF(LAG(total_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 0), 2) AS pct_change
FROM time_buckets
ORDER BY period DESC
LIMIT {{limit}}

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.label: Table Name
parameters.description: Name of the CSV/Parquet file (without extension)

parameters.name: date_column
parameters.label: Date Column
parameters.description: Name of the column containing dates

parameters.name: value_column
parameters.label: Value Column
parameters.description: Name of the numeric column to aggregate

parameters.name: time_bucket
parameters.label: Time Bucket
parameters.description: Aggregation period: day, week, or month

parameters.name: limit
parameters.label: Number of Periods
parameters.description: How many time periods to show

author: Sery Team
example_output:
Returns a table with columns:
- `period`: Time period (day/week/month start date)
- `row_count`: Number of records in this period
- `total_value`: Sum of values in this period
- `avg_value`: Average value
- `min_value`: Minimum value
- `max_value`: Maximum value
- `stddev_value`: Standard deviation
- `change_from_prev`: Absolute change from previous period
- `pct_change`: Percentage change from previous period
